'''Castaan Armory''' was a specialized body [[Armor/Legends|armor]] manufacturing company. They customized each suit to meet the needs of different alien [[Species/Legends|species]]. One of these was the [[Castaan Staad armor|Staad armor]] which was a form of protective armor designed for [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'leks]].
